company.about: The Dimensions is a Nashik-based architecture and interior design studio shaping residential, commercial, and development projects with clarity, warmth, and long-term craft. From early concept to built detail, the studio turns ambitious spatial ideas into places that feel considered, useful, and memorable.
company.philosophy: Great architecture should feel inevitable: light arriving at the right time, materials aging with grace, and every plan quietly serving the lives inside it.
company.address: Aditya Towers, 1, near Gurukripa Building, Canada Corner, Nashik, Maharashtra 422005

projects.title: Brickline Residences
projects.concept: A contemporary mixed-use building where an active commercial base supports a warm, brick-clad residential volume shaped by balconies, greenery, and a strong urban corner identity.
projects.description: Brickline Residences is a mixed-use development in Govind Nagar, Nashik, designed by The Dimensions for Shreya Developers. The project combines ground-floor commercial shops with seven levels of residential apartments above, creating an active urban frontage while maintaining a refined residential identity. Spread across approximately 45,000 sq. ft., the building is shaped by warm brick, crisp white framing, recessed windows, glass balconies, and integrated greenery.
projects.longDescription: Located in the residential suburb of Govind Nagar, Nashik, Brickline Residences brings together everyday urban convenience and refined residential living. Commercial shops activate the front edge of the ground floor, while seven residential levels above are planned around efficient floor plates, balconies, natural light, ventilation, and planted edges. The architectural language balances exposed brick surfaces with clean white framing elements, giving the building a strong corner presence while keeping the expression contemporary and restrained.
projects.altText: Brickline Residences residential and commercial building in Govind Nagar Nashik by The Dimensions

projects.title: The Civic Edge
projects.description: A commercial workspace with clean structural expression, layered circulation, and a strong street-facing identity.

projects.title: Shadow Line Residence
projects.description: A warm, material-rich residence where deep openings, filtered light, and measured proportions create a composed living experience.

projects.title: Studio Atrium
projects.description: An interior-led project built around hospitality, tactility, and a memorable atrium sequence.

projects.title: Industrial Court
projects.description: A compact planning study focused on service efficiency, daylight, circulation, and a disciplined architectural presence.

testimonials.quote: They understood both the business need and the emotional impact of the space. The final design gives our office a sharp identity without losing warmth.
testimonials.name: Amit Deshmukh
